phone._comment: Subscribe to this topic in the ntfy app. You get a push; reply to the topic and the agent reads it back. Use --channel phone, or set this as default_channel on headless boxes.

slack._comment: One-way only (notify). Default body is {"text": "<title>: <message>"}, which Slack/Discord-compatible incoming webhooks accept.

say._comment: Escape hatch: run any program. Placeholders: {message} {title} {default} {options}. notify uses exit code; ask reads stdout; confirm uses exit 0=approve / nonzero=deny.
